What You Get

See your finished space before a single cabinet is ordered. Full 3D renders, your style, your finishes.

We match your vision to the right materials, finishes, and layout — or we go back to the drawing board.

HVAC Systems

Heat Pumps, Mini Splits & Air Quality SystemsBuilt for New England Homes

At Elevate Kitchen & Home, we install modern HVAC systems designed for total home comfort — including heat pumps, mini splits, advanced air filtration, and humidity control.

Our HVAC Services

Complete Indoor Environment Solutions

Heat Pump Systems

Whole-Home Comfort

Heat pumps provide both heating and cooling in one high-efficiency system, making them ideal for Massachusetts homes.

  • ✔Lower energy costs
  • ✔Consistent year-round comfort
  • ✔Designed for cold New England winters
  • ✔Reduced reliance on oil or electric heat
Get a Free Consultation
Mini Split Systems

Zoned Comfort

Mini splits allow for room-by-room temperature control without ductwork, making them perfect for remodels and targeted upgrades.

Ideal For
  • Kitchen remodels
  • Additions & basements
  • Older homes without ducts
Benefits
  • Zoned temperature control
  • High energy efficiency
  • Quiet, low-profile operation
Get a Free Consultation
Advanced Air Filtration

HEPA Systems

All of our systems can be equipped with HEPA (High-Efficiency Particulate Air) grade air filtration, improving indoor air quality by capturing:

  • ✔Dust & allergens
  • ✔Pet dander
  • ✔Airborne particles
  • ✔Cleaner, healthier air overall
Get a Free Consultation
Whole-Home Dehumidifier Systems

Complete Humidity Control

Humidity plays a major role in comfort. We install integrated dehumidifier systems that control moisture throughout your entire home.

  • ✔Prevent mold & mildew
  • ✔Improve air quality
  • ✔Increase comfort in summer
  • ✔Protect cabinets, flooring, and finishes
Learn More About Dehumidifiers
Professional Installation

You Can Trust

Proper installation is everything. Our process ensures correct system sizing, clean detail-focused installs, and seamless integration into your home.

We install HVAC systems with the same precision as our remodeling projects — no shortcuts, no guesswork, just precision work done right the first time.

Ongoing Maintenance

& System Care

We provide ongoing service to keep your system running at peak efficiency.

  • ✔Routine maintenance
  • ✔System inspections
  • ✔Performance optimization
  • ✔Longer system lifespan
  • ✔Fewer unexpected repairs
Financing & Rebates

Flexible Financing & Massachusetts Rebates

Homeowners may qualify for significant savings through these programs. We help guide you through every option so you can maximize savings while upgrading your home.
